_comment: Single source of truth for the per-org system Decisions table (Phase 4.2, roadmap §16). Decisions extracted from meeting reports are persisted here as Rows so they form a queryable, per-decision-authorized registry. The Meeting/Report/Source fields are STRUCTURAL (hold ids / 'ai'|'manual') — they live in Row.data (no sidecar table, so no prod DDL) and drive re-derivation (delete a meeting's AI decisions on regenerate) + authz (a user sees a decision only if they can access its meeting). They are hidden from the bespoke registry UI; the system table is hidden from the generic Database UI (Table.system=true).
